diagrams.title: Singly Linked List Node Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the internal structure of a node in a singly linked list
elements: NEXT pointer (contains address of next node)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding fundamental building block of linked lists

diagrams.title: Insertion at Beginning Operation
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of inserting a new node at the beginning
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how head pointer and new node's next are modified

diagrams.title: Deletion Operation in Singly Linked List
diagrams.description: Shows the process of deleting a node from the middle of the list

diagrams.title: Complete Singly Linked List Example
diagrams.description: A complete example showing a list with 4 nodes and all key elements
diagrams.purpose: Overall understanding of list structure and traversal
